title: lepechinia salviifolia
intro: Lepechinia salviifolia, also known as Mexican mountain mint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to Mexico. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lepechinia salviifolia include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and ease respiratory problems such as colds and flu. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herb used in traditional medicine and herbal remedies.
